info.name: Atlassian rest/atlassian-connect/1/addons/
info.description:
Needs description.

Contact Support:
 Email: ecosystem@atlassian.com

variable.description: (Required) The key of the app, as defined in its descriptor.

request.description:
Deletes an app's property.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** Only a Connect app whose key matches `addonKey` can make this request.
Additionally, Forge apps can access Connect app properties (stored against the same `app.connect.key`).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the property key is longer than 127 characters.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the property is not found or doesn't belong to the app.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the app, as defined in its descriptor.

request.description:
Returns the key and value of an app's property.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** Only a Connect app whose key matches `addonKey` can make this request.
Additionally, Forge apps can access Connect app properties (stored against the same `app.connect.key`).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the property key is longer than 127 characters.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the property is not found or doesn't belong to the app.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the app, as defined in its descriptor.

request.description:
Sets the value of an app's property. Use this resource to store custom data for your app.

The value of the request body must be a [valid](http://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc4627), non-empty JSON blob. The maximum length is 32768 characters.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** Only a Connect app whose key matches `addonKey` can make this request.
Additionally, Forge apps can access Connect app properties (stored against the same `app.connect.key`).

response.name: Returned if the property is updated.
Returned is the property is created.

Returned if:
  * the property key is longer than 127 characters.
  * the value is not valid JSON.
  * the value is longer than 32768 characters.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the app, as defined in its descriptor.

request.description:
Gets all the properties of an app.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** Only a Connect app whose key matches `addonKey` can make this request.
Additionally, Forge apps can access Connect app properties (stored against the same `app.connect.key`).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
